name: speckit-codex-flow
description: Local Codex workflow guardrails and tools for GitHub Spec Kit.

interface.shortDescription: Guide Spec Kit projects through Codex.
interface.longDescription: Spec Kit Codex Flow adds local Codex skills and MCP tools that bootstrap GitHub Spec Kit, inspect project artifacts, and enforce spec-driven gates before implementation.
defaultPrompt: Start the Spec Kit workflow for this repo.
Create a Spec Kit feature spec from my request.
Bootstrap Spec Kit for Codex in this project.
